nasb.text: All of the people who were left of the Hittites, the Amorites, the Perizzites, the Hivites and the Jebusites, who were not of Israel,

esv.text: All the people who were left of the Hittites, the Amorites, the Perizzites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites, who were not of Israel,

cnv.text: 至於以色列人以外的赫人、亞摩利人、比利洗人、希未人和耶布斯人剩下來的人民，

ccb.text: 当时国中有赫人、亚摩利人、比利洗人、希未人和耶布斯人的后裔，
